title: Regional Center for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026 -
how_to_apply: Walk-In Interview: Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable) Regional Centre for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026

vacancy_details.eligibility: B.Tech/ B.Sc in Life Sciences/ Biotech/ Microbiology
Graduate/ BCA + Diploma in Computer Applications

paragraphs: Regional Center for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026: The Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB has issued a notification for the position of Apprentice. The recruitment drive comprises 14 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply between 08 June to 12 June 2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the Regional Center for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
